arts.ttl: Arsenal make final decision on Ollie Watkins summer transfer after shock £40m bid
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins was a surprise transfer target for Arsenal back in January, but the Aston Villa striker is not expected to be targeted again by the Londoners this summer

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs. Nottingham Forest: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Nott'm Forest, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Premier League owner with alleged links to criminal organisation faces trial
arts.sum: Marinakis and the other four defendants have denied the ”misdemeanor” charges of “inciting sports-related violence and supporting a criminal organisation”. Marinakis is also the owner of Olympiacos and he’s been charged by Greek authorities over alleged ties to criminal organisations.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo makes Steve Cooper claim that will surprise many Nottingham Forest fans

arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'discover' Arsenal stance on Ollie Watkins ahead of summer transfer window
arts.sum: Arsenal made a move to sign Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins in the January transfer window but will not be returning for the 29-year-old in the summer Arsenal have reportedly decided against reigniting their interest in Aston Villa's star striker Ollie Watkins ahead of the summer transfer window.
